problem id: bd049614
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(5) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(2)

examples:
  00000100 -> 00000000
  10010110 -> 01000000
  00001000 -> 00000000
  11111110 -> 11000001
  01100101 -> 10000000
  01111100 -> 10000000
  10000111 -> 00000000
  00101000 -> 00000000
  11010000 -> 00000001

query: 01000111
predicted answer: 00000000
